top_risks: Priority weighting appears inconsistent in high-conflict evaluation scenarios.
Simulation artifacts indicate instability or urgent-event reordering weakness under replayed load.
Coverage for omitted critical items is uneven between evaluation evidence and operational reporting.
Cross-layer signals indicate drift between measured evaluation quality, simulation behavior, and operational assurances.
cross_layer_findings: Cross-layer signals indicate drift between measured evaluation quality, simulation behavior, and operational assurances.
